_comment: Rafa configuration. Set enabled to true for each integration you want active. API keys go in .env — never hardcode them here.

_help.team_id: The team slug from your Linear URL: linear.app/YOUR-TEAM-SLUG/...
_help.project_id: The project slugId or name from Linear. Run create-linear-tasks.sh with an invalid value to see available projects. Leave empty to create issues without a project.
_help.todo_state_name: Linear workflow state for new tasks. Usually 'Todo' or 'Backlog'.
_help.in_progress_state_name: Linear state Rafa sets when it starts working on a task.
_help.done_state_name: Linear state Rafa sets when it finishes a task. 'Ready for Review' lets a human verify before closing. Must match your Linear workflow state name exactly.

_help.mode: 'dm' sends a private message to notify_user_id (requires SLACK_BOT_TOKEN). 'webhook' posts to a channel (requires SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL). dm is recommended.
_help.notify_user_id: Your Slack user ID. Find it in Slack: click your name → View profile → ⋯ → Copy member ID. Looks like UXXXXXXXXXX.
_help.bot_token_env: Env var name for your Slack Bot Token (starts with xoxb-). Needs scopes: chat:write, im:write.
_help.notify_on: Events that trigger a notification: task_start, task_done, all_complete, error.

_help.auto_commit: Set to false to skip commits — useful for reviewing changes before committing.
_help.commit_message_prefix: Prepended to every commit: 'rafa: [T001] Initialize project structure'

task_selection._help: Controls which tasks Rafa skips. You generally shouldn't need to change this.

_help.enabled: When true, Rafa follows red-green-refactor on every bot task: write a failing test first, then minimal implementation to pass, then refactor. Individual tasks can override with a 'tdd' boolean field in TASKS.json (true forces TDD on, false opts out even if globally enabled).
